shortDescription: Online proctored · Fast results · Growing uni acceptance

policyAlert.summary: Verify Duolingo English Test exam fee and dates on the official booking portal before quoting. Coaching fee is separate. Never guarantee a score.

alert.title: Institution-specific acceptance
alert.body: Duolingo English Test is accepted by many universities but not by IRCC for Canadian PR. Confirm the student's institution list before enrollment.

about.label: Description
about.value: Structured Duolingo English Test preparation with trainer-led classes, homework, and progress tracking.

about.label: Ideal for
about.value: Students with university acceptance listing DET; confirm institution and score minimum.

about.label: Delivery
about.value: Classroom or hybrid per branch schedule. Materials per program policy.

about.label: After course
about.value: Exam guidance, score tracking, retake recommendation, and handoff to admissions/visa team when target met.

eligibility.criterion: Diagnostic or prior score on file

redFlagsBanner: If attendance drops or mocks stay far below target, pause exam booking and reset the study plan.

redFlags.title: Unrealistic target
redFlags.description: Large gap expected in very short timeline.
redFlags.fix: Reset timeline or recommend appropriate program

redFlags.title: Chronic absenteeism
redFlags.fix: Counselor call, batch change, or pause

faqs.a: No. IRCC does not accept Duolingo for immigration.
Online proctored from home — verify system requirements on englishtest.duolingo.com.

compliance: Never guarantee exam scores or bands
Separate coaching fee from exam registration fee
Signed enrollment agreement before batch start
Record diagnostic and mock scores on client file
proTips: Set target in writing at enrollment
Confirm correct test/module for student pathway
Book official exam only when mocks support readiness
postApproval: Collect official score report when released
Update client record for admissions / visa team
Plan retake or booster if below target

timeline.title: Exam booking, test day prep, score follow-up

changelog.summary: Initial Duolingo English Test coaching specimen.

staffNotes.author: Coaching team
staffNotes.text: Use this specimen for counselor training on Duolingo English Test.

dos: Keep exam fee separate on quotes
mistakes: Visa team not updated when target met

quiz.question: Counselors must never for Duolingo English Test:
quiz.explanation: Score guarantees are prohibited for all coaching programs.

quiz.question: Duolingo English Test coaching fee and official exam fee should be:
quiz.explanation: Coaching and exam fees must be quoted separately.

quiz.question: Before enrollment in Duolingo English Test, FLC recommends:
quiz.explanation: Diagnostic and target alignment are required before batch start.

quiz.question: Minimum attendance standard for Duolingo English Test is typically:
quiz.explanation: Review attendance when it drops below 80%.

quiz.question: Enrollment agreement for Duolingo English Test should be signed:
Before advising official exam booking for Duolingo English Test:
quiz.explanation: Readiness should be based on mock performance.

quiz.question: When attendance drops below 80% in Duolingo English Test:
Official score report for Duolingo English Test should be:
options: Logged on client file and shared with visa/admissions team
quiz.explanation: Score reports must be documented and handed off when relevant.

quiz.question: Before enrolling in DET prep, confirm:
options: University accepts DET and minimum score
IRCC accepts DET for all PR

quiz.question: A student with unrealistic target timeline for Duolingo English Test should:
quiz.explanation: Unrealistic timelines must be corrected before enrollment.

quiz.question: Sales promising a guaranteed band/score for Duolingo English Test is:
Retake planning for Duolingo English Test should be based on:
Visa/admissions team handoff for Duolingo English Test happens when:
options: Target met and official report available
quiz.explanation: Hand off when target is met and documentation is on file.

quiz.question: DET is accepted by IRCC for Express Entry:
quiz.explanation: IRCC does not accept Duolingo for immigration.
